message:
chore: SEO optimize npm packages for discovery (v3.0.0-alpha.181)

Changes to improve npm search visibility:

@claude-flow/cli & claude-flow:
- Enhanced description with key terms (AI agents, Claude Code, MCP, swarm)
- Expanded keywords (32 terms covering AI, LLM, automation, enterprise)
- Added homepage, bugs, repository links
- Added funding (GitHub sponsors)
- Expanded author info with email/url

Keywords now include:
- AI/LLM: claude, anthropic, gpt, llm, large-language-model
- Agents: ai-agents, multi-agent, swarm-intelligence, orchestration
- Tech: mcp, model-context-protocol, vector-database, embeddings
- Use: cli, developer-tools, automation, enterprise

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "claude-flow",
-  "version": "3.0.0-alpha.180",
+  "version": "3.0.0-alpha.181",
   "description": "Enterprise AI agent orchestration for Claude Code - Deploy 60+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus, vector memory, and MCP integration",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "type": "module",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "@claude-flow/cli",
-  "version": "3.0.0-alpha.180",
+  "version": "3.0.0-alpha.181",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Claude Flow CLI - Enterprise AI agent orchestration with 60+ specialized agents, swarm coordination, MCP server, self-learning hooks, and vector memory for Claude Code",
   "main": "dist/src/index.js",
